task.title: Fix PR 823 conflicts checks and comments

events.content: Break SDK and Slack primitive package cycle: Break SDK and Slack primitive package cycle

raw.question: Break SDK and Slack primitive package cycle
raw.chosen: Break SDK and Slack primitive package cycle
raw.reasoning: CI failed because turbo detected @agent-relay/sdk and @agent-relay/slack-primitive as cyclic build dependencies; the SDK can depend on Slack primitive, but Slack primitive examples can resolve SDK from the workspace without declaring it as a devDependency.
